title: Is It Time for Geri Care? 6 Signs Your Elderly Loved One Needs At-Home Assistance
excerpt: Recognizing when an elderly family member needs help can be tough. This guide covers 6 common signs that indicate it's time to consider professional geri care therapy to enhance their safety, independence, and quality of life at home.
content: This article would detail signs like difficulty with daily activities, unexplained bruises, poor hygiene, social withdrawal, and forgetfulness, explaining how Geri Care Therapy can address these issues. It would link to the Geri Care Therapy service page.
